We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.
Crypto’s mascot. Got my flocked Paxton in from - flawless as ever  Added some more of my pudgy fun to fill it up, plus some lights. What do you think, did I shove too much in there?

Pudgy Penguins are heading back to San Diego Comic-Con 2026  We’re proud to return for our fourth year to one of the world’s largest pop culture events and continue our mission of championing Web3 IP. RSVP below.

If you’re planning on attending San Diego Comic-Con, make sure to stop by our booth for exclusive merch, products, and more! RSVP here: Culture on Ethereum , very interesting questions on community buildings, cults, cultures and retention of users Lot of momentum built up for 2027 & 2028. Pengu morning ✈︎
